summary: Tested Post Menu features (Delete, Turn off commenting, Hide like count), NOAA tide data integration, wave direction degrees, and Create Post with wave/tide fields. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Post menu shows all options, Delete confirmation modal works, Toggle commenting/like count work with success toasts, Session log headers present in feed, Create Post modal has wave_direction and tide_height_ft fields.

minor.issue: NOAA tide_status/tide_height_ft may not be returned if current time is before first tide prediction of the day (timing edge case). tide_source='noaa' is correctly returned.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post menu features (Delete, Turn off commenting, Hide like count) are fully functional. NOAA tide integration works - tide_source='noaa' is returned for US spots. Wave direction degrees are returned from /api/surf-conditions. Create Post modal has all session metadata fields including wave_direction, wave_direction_degrees, tide_status, and tide_height_ft.

features_verified.delete_post_menu: PASS - Delete menu item shows confirmation modal with 'Delete Post?' title and warning text
features_verified.delete_confirmation_modal: PASS - Shows Cancel and Delete buttons, warning about permanent deletion
features_verified.turn_off_commenting: PASS - Toggle works, shows 'Comments disabled' toast, menu changes to 'Turn on commenting'
features_verified.turn_on_commenting: PASS - Toggle works, shows 'Comments enabled' toast, menu changes to 'Turn off commenting'
features_verified.hide_like_count: PASS - Toggle works, shows 'Like count hidden' toast, menu changes to 'Show like count'
features_verified.show_like_count: PASS - Toggle works, shows 'Like count shown' toast, menu changes to 'Hide like count'
features_verified.noaa_tide_source: PASS - US spots return tide_source='noaa' confirming NOAA integration
features_verified.noaa_tide_status: PARTIAL - tide_status may not be returned due to timing edge case (before first tide of day)
features_verified.post_with_wave_direction: PASS - POST /api/posts saves wave_direction and wave_direction_degrees
features_verified.post_with_tide_height: PASS - POST /api/posts saves tide_status and tide_height_ft
features_verified.session_log_headers: PASS - 15 session log headers found in feed with data-testid='session-log-header'
features_verified.create_post_session_fields: PASS - Create Post modal has Wave Height, Period, Wave Dir, Wind, Direction, Tide Status, Tide Height fields
features_verified.international_spots_no_noaa: PASS - International spots correctly have no NOAA tide data

api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/posts/{id}: PASS - Deletes post, returns success message
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/surf-conditions?spot_name=new_s: PASS - Returns tide_source='noaa' for US spot
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/surf-conditions?spot_name=hunti: PASS - Returns tide_source='noaa' for CA spot
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/surf-conditions?spot_name=pipel: PASS - Returns tide_source='noaa' for HI spot
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/surf-conditions?spot_name=nazar: PASS - No NOAA for international spot

console_errors_noted: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - 404 (not related to tested features)
